headline.en: UNI still net inflationary at +1.98%/yr with retail crowded long on a thin book — the discount is optical, not fundamental
headline.zh: UNI 净增发仍达 +1.98%/年,散户单边做多且盘口极薄,当前'折价'只是表象而非基本面

keyChanges.en: Price $3.3620 sits 44% below the DAO's own $5.96 treasury burn anchor, deep inside the $3-3.5 retail capitulation zone
keyChanges.zh: 现价 $3.3620 较 DAO 自己的 $5.96 国库销毁隐含价低 44%,处于 $3-3.5 散户投降区间深处

keyChanges.en: Net emission +1.98%/yr: $7.92M buyback burns only 2.35M UNI against 20M annual emission — burn narrative not yet load-bearing
keyChanges.zh: 净增发 +1.98%/年:$7.92M 回购预算年销毁仅 2.35M UNI,对比年增发 20M UNI,回购销毁叙事尚未成立

keyChanges.en: v4 Protocol Fees Temp Check now live on Snapshot — first concrete supply-side catalyst since UNIfication, but Temp Check is signaling, not activation
keyChanges.zh: v4 Protocol Fees Temp Check 已在 Snapshot 上线,是 UNIfication 后首个实质性供给端催化,但 Temp Check 仅为意向投票,并非正式激活

contrarianObservation.en: The entire bear thesis rests on emission math at $3.36. If v4 fees activate and protocol revenue step-changes, net emission flips deflationary at this same price with zero price appreciation required. With OI at only $15.2M, a quiet accumulator below $5.96 has an asymmetric setup — absence of catalyst is not permanent.
contrarianObservation.zh: 看空逻辑完全建立在 $3.36 这个价位的增发数学上。若 v4 fee 通过并激活,协议收入阶跃式增长,同价位下净增发即可翻转为通缩,无需任何价格上涨。加上 OI 仅 $15.2M,在 $5.96 之下静默吸筹的聪明钱拥有极不对称的赔率。当前无催化不等于永远无催化。

watchNext.en: v4 Protocol Fees Temp Check result and timeline to on-chain vote — the single most important governance event this month
watchNext.zh: v4 Protocol Fees Temp Check 结果及后续链上投票时间表 - 本月最关键的治理事件

watchNext.en: Any RFC movement on redirecting buybacks from burn to stakers (real-yield pivot) — would reprice UNI on DCF instead of PE multiple
watchNext.zh: 回购从销毁改分给 staker 的 RFC(real-yield 转型)是否推进 - 若通过,UNI 将由 PE 倍数估值切换为 DCF 现金流估值

watchNext.en: Long/Short ratio and OI trajectory — if 2.47 climbs while price stays flat, unwind risk stacks ahead of any governance disappointment
watchNext.zh: Long/Short 比率与 OI 走向 - 若价格横盘时 2.47 继续走高,一旦治理不及预期,去杠杆风险将集中释放

fullReasoning.en: UNI trades at $3.36, sitting inside the retail capitulation zone and 44% below the DAO's own $5.96 treasury burn implied price. The setup looks like a discount, but the mechanics say otherwise. Annualized protocol revenue of $46.56M produces a $7.92M buyback budget — roughly 2.35M UNI burned per year against 20M emitted. That is +1.98% net inflation, not deflation. The buyback-and-burn narrative is not yet load-bearing at this price. Derivatives confirm the fragility: OI is a microscopic $15.2M, funding is flat, and long/short account ratio at 2.47 shows retail is one-sided long into a thin book. Volume of $7.13M on a $2.09B cap is 0.34% turnover, meaning any real seller moves price. The v4 fee switch Temp Check is the one genuine catalyst on the board, but Temp Check is signaling, not activation, and the market has been trained to fade fee-switch hopium. Governance is also visibly distracted by a stalled Cantina mediation dispute and a wave of URC hook proposals — technical progress but not a price catalyst. Stance is bearish over 1-4 weeks: no supply-side flip yet, crowded positioning, weak UNI/ETH at 0.00193. The trigger to reverse this call is v4 fees actually turning on, or the RFC to redirect buybacks to stakers gaining serious momentum.
fullReasoning.zh: UNI 现价 $3.36,处于散户投降区间,距 DAO 自己的 $5.96 国库销毁隐含价还低 44%。表面看是折价,但机制层面并不支撑。年化协议收入 $46.56M,按 17% 计出的 buyback(回购)预算仅 $7.92M,对应年销毁约 2.35M UNI,而年增发固定为 20M UNI,净增发仍有 +1.98%,根本不是通缩。'回购销毁'叙事在当前价位撑不住。衍生品进一步印证脆弱性:Binance 永续 OI(未平仓)仅 $15.2M,funding rate(资金费率)几乎为零,long/short account ratio 高达 2.47,说明散户单边做多且盘口极薄。24h 成交 $7.13M / 市值 $2.09B,换手率仅 0.34%,任何真实卖盘都能推动价格。目前唯一实质性催化是 v4 Protocol Fees 的 Temp Check,但 Temp Check 只是意向投票,不等于激活,而市场已被 fee switch 预期反复消耗。治理端注意力还被 Cantina 悬赏仲裁纠纷以及一批 URC hook 提案分散,技术进展不假,但不是价格催化。1-4 周维度维持看空:供给端未翻转、多头拥挤、UNI/ETH 比价 0.00193 疲软。真正的翻转触发点是 v4 fee 实际开启,或'回购改分红给 staker'的 RFC 取得实质进展。
